name: Allegiance
description_short: Allegiance Credit Union is an Oklahoma City-based credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and member-focused service.
description_long:
Allegiance Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Oklahoma City, serving consumers seeking an alternative to traditional banks. The organization emphasizes community-based banking with a stated mission of helping members "save more, borrow smarter, and build a stronger future." With a routing number of 303085230, Allegiance functions as a full-service credit union offering comprehensive financial products.

The credit union's product suite includes checking and savings accounts (funded with as little as $5), auto loans starting at 3.49% APR, mortgages, credit cards, 7-month certificates of deposit at 3.75% APY, and credit builder loans at 9.99% APR with no credit check requirement. Members gain access to a mobile banking app featuring real-time account monitoring, mobile check deposit, debit card controls (lock/unlock functionality), bill payment scheduling, and free credit score monitoring and daily credit report access. Customer support channels include phone support at (405) 789-7900, secure video banking through the app, web chat, and contact forms.

Allegiance differentiates itself through emphasis on personalized local service, a member referral program offering $50 for checking account referrals and $100 for loan referrals over $10,000 (with no referral limits), and integrated financial tools including a free monthly budget template. The credit union positions itself explicitly as "The Best Credit Union in Oklahoma City" with messaging focused on community membership and member-first service philosophy. Spanish-language support is available via their website.

As a credit union, Allegiance operates under member-ownership principles rather than shareholder profit maximization, potentially offering advantages in rates and fee structures. However, the organization's geographic focus on Oklahoma City and surrounding areas may limit accessibility for non-local members, and membership eligibility requirements (not detailed on the website) typically apply to credit unions. The product offerings are standard for full-service credit unions without specialized or innovative financial products. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Credit builder loans (no credit check, 9.99% APR)
Mobile banking app with check deposit, bill payment, transfer scheduling, debit card controls
Free credit score monitoring and daily credit report access
Member referral program with cash bonuses
pros: Auto loans as low as 3.49% APR, competitive for credit union lending
7-month certificates of deposit at 3.75% APY available
Credit builder loans available with no credit check required at 9.99% APR
Free credit score monitoring and daily credit report access through mobile app
Debit card lock/unlock controls in real-time through mobile app
Mobile check deposit functionality for account funding on-the-go
Member referral program with no limits on earnings ($50 per checking account, $100 per loan over $10,000)
Secure video banking option for personalized remote support
New accounts can be opened with minimum $5 deposit
cons: Geographic limitations as Oklahoma City-based credit union; membership eligibility requirements not clearly disclosed on website
Credit builder loan rate of 9.99% APR is relatively high compared to some alternatives, though positioned as accessible option
Limited information about membership eligibility criteria, field of membership, or service area boundaries on main website
No mention of overdraft protection, bounce protection fees, or other account protection features
Email communication explicitly warned as insecure for sensitive information, limiting digital support options for account issues
best_for: Oklahoma City residents seeking relationship-based banking with local credit union community ownership
Auto loan borrowers looking for rates under 4% APR with member-focused service
Consumers building credit with no credit check credit builder loans and free credit monitoring tools
Savers seeking competitive CD rates and those who prefer credit union membership model over traditional banks
diagnosis: Allegiance Credit Union is best for Oklahoma City-area residents who value local, community-focused banking and qualify for membership. The primary caveat is that as a credit union with geographic roots, membership eligibility may be restricted to specific service areas, employment groups, or other field-of-membership criteria not detailed on their main website—prospective members should verify eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
